code: import axios from"axios";const API=axios.create({baseURL:"https://eventify-booking-backend.onrender.com",headers:{"Content-Type":"application/json"},timeout:10000});export const fetchEvents=()=>API.get("/events");export const fetchEventById=id=>API.get(`/events/${id}`);export const fetchEventsByCategory=cat=>API.get(`/events/category/${cat}`);export const fetchEventsByLocation=loc=>API.get(`/events/location/${loc}`);export const createEvent=data=>API.post("/events",data);export const updateEvent=(id,data)=>API.put(`/events/${id}`,data);export const deleteEvent=id=>API.delete(`/events/${id}`);export const fetchBookings=()=>API.get("/bookings");export const createBooking=data=>API.post("/bookings",data);export const getRecommendations=data=>API.post("/events/recommend",data);export const chatWithAI=message=>API.post("/events/chat",{message});export default API;
